name: Spicy Turkey Burgers
recipeIngredient: Slices of Monterey jack cheese, lettuce,
tomato, onion, avocado, red onion, etc.
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the oregano, pepper, cumin powder, garlic powder, egg white and salsa.
2. Add the turkey to the bowl and mix thoroughly until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Shape the mixture into 2 burgers.
4. Cook the burgers on stove top in a cast iron grill pan or on an outdoor grill over medium heat.
5. Cook the burgers for 6-8 minutes per side, or until the center is no longer pink.
6. Serve the cooked burgers with desired toppings and on buns.
